query: make this RTL
reason: Direct mention of RTL — core trigger phrase.

reason: Direct RTL audit request — matches /rtl-audit semantics.

reason: Arabic UI work — explicit domain match.

reason: Arabic UI build — implicit RTL requirement.

reason: Saudi users → Arabic interface → RTL layout. Indirect signal.

reason: Directional icon bug in Arabic UI — classic RTL skill territory.

reason: Slash command — explicit invocation.

query: /rtl-audit src/components
reason: Slash command with path argument.

reason: Slash command on a specific file.

reason: Slash command — golden checklist pass.

query: rtlize this dropdown
reason: Slang verb for RTL conversion — explicit trigger.

query: I need bidirectional text support in this input
reason: Bidirectional text is listed in the description triggers.

query: review this Arabic form for layout issues
reason: Arabic form + layout review = RTL audit on a component.

query: the dashboard breaks when I switch to RTL mode
reason: RTL bug report — direct trigger.

query: add Hebrew support to this UI
reason: Hebrew is RTL — same layout rules apply even though description emphasizes Arabic.

query: build a French landing page
reason: Non-English LTR locale. Easy false positive if the agent over-generalizes from 'Arabic' to 'foreign language'.

query: fix the layout on this page
reason: Generic layout request — no RTL or Arabic signal.

query: the text is right-aligned and looks weird, can you fix it
reason: Mentions 'right' but not RTL. Likely a CSS alignment bug, not a direction issue.

query: translate this English copy into Arabic
reason: Content translation, not UI work. Mentions Arabic but the task is linguistic, not layout — high false-positive risk.

query: set up internationalization for this React app
reason: i18n is broader than RTL. Could include RTL eventually but the request itself is about plumbing (i18next, locale files).

query: add dark mode to this design system
reason: Theming work — unrelated to direction.

query: the button is on the left side, move it to the right
reason: Mentions left/right but is a per-element design tweak, not RTL mirroring.

query: convert this component to TypeScript
reason: Mentions 'convert' but the target is TS, not RTL. Verb collision.

query: audit our accessibility for WCAG compliance
reason: Mentions 'audit' but the domain is a11y, not RTL. Verb collision.

query: the right-click context menu isn't showing
reason: 'Right-click' is an input event, not a direction concern.

query: make this responsive on mobile
reason: Responsive design — no direction signal.

query: add multilingual support for English and Spanish
reason: i18n with two LTR locales. No RTL languages mentioned.

query: the form labels are misaligned
reason: Generic form layout bug — no Arabic or RTL signal.
